name: Calculateur Ratio Dette
desc: Calculez Debt ratio = Total debt / Net equity. Exemple: Debt €40,000, Equity €160,000 = Ratio = 0.25 (25%). Calculateur gratuit et précis, sans inscription.
description: Calculez Debt ratio = Total debt / Net equity. Exemple: Debt €40,000, Equity €160,000 = Ratio = 0.25 (25%). Calculateur gratuit et précis, sans inscription.
seo_description: Calculez Debt ratio = Total debt / Net equity. Exemple: Debt €40,000, Equity €160,000 = Ratio = 0.25 (25%). Calculateur gratuit et précis, sans inscription.
example_label: Calculezting debt-to-income ratio with €1,monthly debt payments and €4,monthly income.
result_context: Your ratio of {ratio}% indicates {evaluacion} debt levels. Lenders typically prefer ratios below 36%.
mistakes: Not including all debt obligations (credit cards, loans, alimony)
Using gross income instead of net for personal budgeting
Ignoring that different debts have different interest costs
